Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Pain Resolve
Waystone (Tier 14)
--------
Revives Available: 1 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +25% (augmented)
Pack Size: +16% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +18% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +75% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 80
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 234(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +24(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Frostbitten" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 18(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Cold
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 109(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
{ Suffix Modifier "Shocking" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Shocked Ground — Unscalable Value
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
